Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Heart (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Heart is an object that the Am’haranai wish to reclaim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Clayborn intends to retrieve the Heart from Nakothi's island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Meia believes her mother was trying to take the Heart for her own purposes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — If the Heart's power is released, it could wake the Dead Mother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Heart is an Elder artifact and a piece of an Elder's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Heart overpowered the seal left by Jorin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Heart turned ancient bodies into Children of Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Sleepless are pleased that the Heart arrived on the Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Shera believes she must keep the Heart out of the Sleepless' hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Shera's goal is to find the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Heart is an object associated with Nakothi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Heart disappeared on the Island and is believed to have been destroyed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Heart is something clients have hired people to seek.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
